name: openwrt-x86_64

# Build the hickory-dns binary as a statically-linked musl executable suitable
# for use on OpenWrt x86-64 targets, then upload it as a workflow artifact.

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/**
    paths:
      - "bin/**"
      - "crates/**"
      - "Cargo.toml"
      - "Cargo.lock"
      - ".github/workflows/openwrt-x86_64.yml"
  pull_request:
    paths:
      - "bin/**"
      - "crates/**"
      - "Cargo.toml"
      - "Cargo.lock"
      - ".github/workflows/openwrt-x86_64.yml"
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event_name }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
  RUST_TARGET: x86_64-unknown-linux-musl
  RUSTFLAGS: "-C target-feature=+crt-static -C target-cpu=x86-64-v3"

jobs:
  build:
    name: build hickory-dns for OpenWrt x86-64
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Install musl build tools
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends musl-tools

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
        with:
          targets: x86_64-unknown-linux-musl

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
        with:
          key: openwrt-x86_64

      - name: Update Cargo dependencies
        run: cargo update

      - name: Build hickory-dns (release, musl static, all compatible features)
        env:
          # Ensure C deps (if any) link against musl
          CC_x86_64_unknown_linux_musl: musl-gcc
          CARGO_TARGET_X86_64_UNKNOWN_LINUX_MUSL_LINKER: musl-gcc
          # Produce a fully static binary
          RUSTFLAGS: "-C target-feature=+crt-static -C target-cpu=x86-64-v3"
        run: |
          # NOTE: `--all-features` cannot be used because hickory-dns exposes
          # mutually exclusive crypto backends (the `*-aws-lc-rs` family vs.
          # the `*-ring` family). We enable the maximal non-conflicting set,
          # using the `ring` backend (best portability under musl/OpenWrt) and
          # skip features unsuited for OpenWrt (`systemd`, `jemalloc*`).
          cargo build \
            --release \
            --target "${RUST_TARGET}" \
            --package hickory-dns \
            --bin hickory-dns \
            --all-features \
            --features "ascii-art,sqlite,resolver,recursor,blocklist,metrics,prometheus-metrics,tls-aws-lc-rs,https-aws-lc-rs,quic-aws-lc-rs,dnssec-aws-lc-rs,rustls-platform-verifier,webpki-roots"

      - name: Strip and stage artifact
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p dist
          install -m 0755 \
            "target/${RUST_TARGET}/release/hickory-dns" \
            "dist/hickory-dns"
          strip "dist/hickory-dns"
          file "dist/hickory-dns"
          ( cd dist && sha256sum hickory-dns > hickory-dns.sha256 )
          tar -C dist -czf "hickory-dns-openwrt-x86_64.tar.gz" hickory-dns hickory-dns.sha256
          ls -lh dist hickory-dns-openwrt-x86_64.tar.gz

      - name: Upload OpenWrt x86-64 artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: hickory-dns-openwrt-x86_64
          path: |
            hickory-dns-openwrt-x86_64.tar.gz
            dist/hickory-dns.sha256
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 30
